title: Mario Kart Wii Shortcuts and Tricks
description:
A few tricks, shortcuts, and neat little paths me and my friend (DawnStarWarrior) put together to show you guys. Just post or comment or write a direct message if you have any questions. 
Music used: Dawnstar chose the music.
Credits: Save yourself
Video: Godspeed

Mario Circuit: Very efficient with the Magikruiser and requires no mushroom with it.

Mushroom Gorge: Requires a mushroom to do.

Coconut Mall: Again, requires the offroad of the Magikruiser. No mushroom needed.

Rainbow Road: No mushroom needed on both ways.

Wario's Goldmine: Requires good miniboost timing.

Wario's Goldmine 2nd shortcut: I'm not sure if this is faster or not, but it definetely looks neat.

GCN Waluigi Stadium: No mushroom required. If done right, proven to be faster.

Dry Dry Ruins: 1st shortcut - No mushroom needed. 2nd shortcut - Mushroom required.

DS Delfino Square: No mushroom needed on both ways. Very efficient shortcut. :)
